text: Hello everybody! It is Sunday morning and I'm going to show you a bit of my Sunday routine.

that I'm organized for everything that's coming up. For a long time I was very old school.
I only used paper and pen for my to-do lists but now everything is digital so I use many apps
to help me stay organized. I usually use four different apps to stay on track. So first I always have
my email open so I can respond to messages. I also use Google Calendar to schedule any meetings
or events. Lately I've been using Notion because you can do everything on this app but I mostly
use it for content creation and work. Finally I use an app on my phone called MyRoutine. It's
basically a to-do list of my daily tasks. I'm a morning person and my brain works better in the
morning so I prefer to do these kinds of tasks right away in the morning with my cup of coffee.
After drinking my coffee and getting my life together I meal prep. Meal prep is so important to me
because it helps me stay healthy and not order out during the week. My meal prep isn't too intense.
I usually just do a few simple items that I can easily grab out of the fridge during the week.
